name: MM Pharma Full Modernization
description:
# MM Pharma Modernization Plan

## Problem statement
The app needs a full UI modernization focused on navbar, footer, page titles/SEO metadata, products UX, and account/admin dashboard areas, while also addressing reported build issues in products/admin surfaces and aligning implementation with the project website specs and current external best practices.

## Current state (repo + specs audit)
- The project currently runs on **Next.js 15.5.19**, React 19, and MUI APIs with mixed style patterns (Tailwind utility classes + MUI `sx` + heavy inline styles).
- Main public shell exists:
  - `components/layouts/NavbarClient.tsx`
  - `components/layouts/Footer.tsx`
  - `app/[locale]/(public)/layout.tsx`
- Products feature exists (`/products`, `/products/[slug]`) with filtering/cards/details and metadata generation.
- Account dashboard exists at `/[locale]/account` (not `/admin/*`); **admin routes are currently absent**, which matches the website specs rule that admin is placeholder/out-of-scope for now.
- Build check result: no TypeScript/build failures reproduced locally; build completes successfully. Observed issues are:
  - MongoDB connectivity warnings during prerender data collection.
  - Next workspace-root warning due to lockfile detection outside repo.
- SEO/title handling exists but is inconsistent versus spec formulas (missing unified x-default hreflang policy and page-level title convention consistency).

## Constraints and standards to enforce
- Follow website specs in `website specs/99-rules/*`:
  - 4px/8px spacing rhythm and touch targets
  - semantic token usage (avoid hardcoded colors/spacing in components)
  - navbar order and privilege matrix behavior
  - metadata formulas + canonical/hreflang + hidden SEO expectations
- Keep App Router architecture and server/client boundaries clean.
- Keep changes surgical but complete across shared layout surfaces.

## Confirmed scope decisions
1. Build a **real initial admin dashboard shell now** (not placeholder-only).
2. Include **framework major upgrades** in this same modernization effort.
3. Perform **full tri-locale modernization now** (`fr-MA`, `ar-MA`, `en-US`) for titles/metadata and key UI copy surfaces.

## Modernization approach
1. Establish a UI modernization baseline and token-compliance checklist from specs.
2. Upgrade framework dependencies (Next.js/MUI alignment) with controlled migration steps.
3. Refactor navbar/footer into spec-compliant, accessible, responsive, token-driven components.
4. Unify page title/metadata generation patterns across key public/account/admin pages in all locales.
5. Stabilize products page UX and data/loading/error behavior while preserving route/query behavior.
6. Modernize account dashboard UI and implement real initial admin dashboard shell with guardrails.
7. Resolve build fragility around products/dashboard data access, workspace warnings, and production build reliability.
8. Validate and finalize with a regression checklist covering locale, RTL, responsiveness, accessibility, and metadata.

## Implementation phases

### Phase 1 — Baseline + design-system compliance
- Inventory all layout/page-level styling primitives and map violations:
  - inline hex usage
  - non-grid spacing values
  - missing semantic tokens
  - missing accessibility semantics
- Define the modernization target for navbar/footer/page titles/products/dashboard before coding.

### Phase 2 — Framework upgrade and migration alignment
- Upgrade Next.js/MUI stack toward website-spec-aligned majors.
- Resolve migration changes for:
  - metadata APIs and config conventions
  - MUI component/grid API differences
  - any route/layout or bundler behavior changes
- Keep upgrade commits logically separated from UI restyling to reduce risk.

### Phase 3 — Navbar modernization
- Rebuild `NavbarClient` and supporting layout integration to match specs:
  - exact nav order and active state behavior
  - desktop + mobile drawer parity
  - robust keyboard navigation, focus styles, skip-link compatibility
  - account/avatar/cart/search interactions with proper role-based behavior
- Reduce inline style blocks in favor of consistent `sx` + theme token usage.

### Phase 4 — Footer modernization
- Refactor footer to a scalable, responsive grid structure aligned with specs:
  - cleaner content hierarchy (products/resources/legal/contact)
  - locale-safe internal links and canonical legal/contact routes
  - improved mobile behavior and tap targets
- Keep brand-rich visual style while removing hardcoded values that break consistency.

### Phase 5 — Titles + SEO metadata modernization
- Standardize metadata across public/account pages:
  - title template consistency
  - canonical URLs + `languages` alternates + `x-default`
  - consistent descriptions and OG basics
- Normalize metadata logic placement between root/locale/page levels to avoid overlap.
- Apply metadata/copy verification across all locales (`fr-MA`, `ar-MA`, `en-US`) including RTL sanity for `ar-MA`.

### Phase 6 — Products page stabilization + modernization
- Improve products listing/detail reliability and UX:
  - filter/query handling coherence
  - loading/empty/error states aligned to specs
  - modernized product cards and section hierarchy
- Address any products build fragility and ensure graceful behavior when upstream data is unavailable.

### Phase 7 — Dashboard/admin modernization
- Modernize account dashboard visuals and information architecture.
- Implement a real initial admin dashboard shell with guarded access and modernized layout primitives.
- Ensure metadata and navigation treatment stays coherent with account/admin boundaries.

### Phase 8 — Build hardening + final polish
- Remove/mitigate workspace-root warning with proper `next.config` setting.
- Reduce build-time dependency fragility from DB access during static generation.
- Run final pass on responsiveness, RTL, and a11y landmarks/focus behavior.

## Deliverables
- Updated dependency stack and migration-safe configuration adjustments.
- Modernized navbar and footer components with improved accessibility and responsive behavior.
- Unified tri-locale metadata/title strategy for major pages.
- Updated products UI and reliability fixes.
- Modernized account dashboard plus initial real admin dashboard shell.
- Build configuration/data-access hardening changes to prevent recurring failures/warnings.

## Risks and mitigation
- **Risk:** Style divergence due to mixed MUI + Tailwind + inline styles.  
  **Mitigation:** enforce token-first patterns on shared layout components and gradually normalize per surface.
- **Risk:** DB-dependent pages causing flaky build behavior.  
  **Mitigation:** isolate critical data fetch paths and add robust server-side error handling strategy.
- **Risk:** Scope explosion from “modernize entire app”.  
  **Mitigation:** prioritize shared shell + products + dashboard first, then expand page-by-page if needed.

## Todo map
- `audit-modernization-baseline`
- `upgrade-framework-stack`
- `refactor-navbar-modern-ui`
- `refactor-footer-modern-ui`
- `unify-page-metadata-seo`
- `stabilize-products-page-build-and-ux`
- `modernize-account-dashboard`
- `implement-admin-scope-path`
- `harden-build-and-config`


excute the plan youve written # MM Pharma — Frontend Modernization Plan

> **Project:** MM Pharma — Fabricant de produits d'hygiène et de désinfection au ALGERIA
> **Stack:** Next.js 15 (App Router) · React 19 · TypeScript 5.7 · Tailwind 4 · MUI 9 · next-intl 4 · Mongoose 9 · Cloudinary · Zustand 5
> **Goals:** Fix build/runtime errors, modernize the visual language to a *distinctive* editorial-pharmaceutical aesthetic, and ship a full admin dashboard. No generic "AI-slop".

---

## 0. Audit Snapshot

| Area | Current state | Verdict |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `next build` | ✅ Compiles (DB connection logs noise only) | Static pages, 66 routes, 102 kB shared JS |
| `tsc --noEmit` | ✅ Clean | No type errors |
| `npm run lint` | ⚠️ No ESLint config present | Needs init |
| Products page | ⚠️ Fails on runtime when DB is unreachable (revalidate + Mongo not whitelisted) | Hardens with cached fallback |
| Admin dashboard | ❌ **Does not exist** | Must be created |
| Navbar | Functional but generic — Inter 16px, flat buttons, no micro-motion | Rewrite |
| Footer | Editorial-pharma already (good bones: oversized wordmark, mono labels) | Polish + consistency |
| Page titles | Inline per page, inconsistent suffix | Centralize via `lib/seo/title` |
| Hero | Strong already (gold italic, grid mask, ISO marquee) | Refine motion + add stats ribbon |
| Section components | MUI-heavy with mixed inline styles + sx | Migrate to design tokens |
| Tailwind 4 + MUI 9 + Emotion | Both present → bundle bloat + style conflicts | Pick Tailwind 4 for primitives, MUI for complex widgets only |

### Build errors to address

1. **Products page runtime crash** — `await import('@/lib/server/api/products.service')` re-evaluates in a serverless env without DB. Build succeeds but `/products` throws on first hit. → wrap `search()` with try/catch + empty-state, drop `revalidate=60` for the search route (use `force-dynamic`).
2. **Stale `revalidate=60` for `/products`** — wrong strategy for a filterable list. Switch to `force-dynamic` and rely on server-side caching by `searchParams`.
3. **`generateStaticParams` on `/products/[slug]`** calls DB at build. → guard with try/catch (already done) but also skip the DB import during `next build` if `MONGODB_URI` not present.
4. **MongoDB Atlas IP not whitelisted** (env) — out of scope; document in `.env.example`.
5. **No ESLint config** — initialize `eslint-config-next` strict.
6. **`@mui/material` 9 with React 19 + Tailwind 4** — works but emits a lot of `sx`-only style strings; migrate the public surface to a single token system.

---

## 1. Aesthetic Direction

**Concept — *"Laboratoire éditorial"*.**
A Moroccan pharmaceutical manufacturer positioned between *Apothecary* (clinical, scientific, trustworthy) and *Editorial* (oversized type, mono labels, generous negative space). Reference vocabulary: Bauhaus type tables, Linear changelog, Stripe press kit, Aesop retail, Brutus magazine grid.

### Visual pillars
1. **Deep navy (#062A4F) + Pharmacist gold (#F2B135) + Bone white (#F5F1E8)**
   — already 80% there; we lock it via CSS vars.
2. **Two type systems** —
   - Display: *Fraunces* (variable, optical-sized serif) for oversized hero statements.
   - Sans: *Inter Tight* for UI (we keep Inter, tighten it).
   - Mono: *JetBrains Mono* for codes, ISO numbers, certifications.
3. **Editorial rhythm** — section labels in `mono · uppercase · letter-spacing 0.32em`, oversized wordmark bleed, golden-ratio grid (12-col, 80px gutter).
4. **Texture** — subtle film grain overlay (8% opacity PNG), radial gold light, dotted micro-grid.
5. **Motion** — staggered hero reveal (CSS animation-delay), magnetic hover on primary CTAs, scroll-progress bar in navbar, parallax wordmark in footer.

> **Anti-pattern ban list:** no purple-on-white, no rounded-pill everything, no glassmorphism, no Space Grotesk, no gradient hero blobs, no "AI illustration" SVGs.

---

## 2. Design System Refactor

### 2.1 New files
```
theme/
  tokens.css            ← CSS variables (colors, type, motion)
  palette.ts            ← keep, refactor to read CSS vars
  motion.ts             ← easing, duration, stagger tokens
  typography.ts         ← type scale + pairing
components/ui/
  primitives/
    Container.tsx       ← editorial container with bleed variants
    SectionLabel.tsx    ← mono N°01 — uppercase label
    Button.tsx          ← magnet, link, ghost variants
    Chip.tsx            ← range chip, scent chip
    Heading.tsx         ← display heading with balance
    Rule.tsx            ← 1px gold rule
  patterns/
    PageHeader.tsx      ← eyebrow + giant title + meta strip
    StatBlock.tsx       ← 3-up stats with mono labels
    Marquee.tsx         ← ISO + brand strip
    GrainLayer.tsx      ← fixed grain texture
    ScrollProgress.tsx  ← top progress bar
    Magnetic.tsx        ← client wrapper for hover-magnet
```

### 2.2 CSS variables (`app/globals.css`)
```css
@theme {
  --color-ink: #0F1620;
  --color-navy: #062A4F;
  --color-navy-700: #07305A;
  --color-navy-500: #0A427C;
  --color-navy-300: #3678BB;
  --color-gold: #F2B135;
  --color-gold-deep: #C58816;
  --color-bone: #F5F1E8;
  --color-paper: #FAFBFC;
  --color-line: #E1E7EE;
  --color-success: #16A37A;
  --color-danger: #D63A3A;
  --font-display: "Fraunces", "Iowan Old Style", Georgia, serif;
  --font-sans: "Inter Tight", "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, monospace;
  --radius-card: 14px;
  --shadow-float: 0 24px 60px -20px rgba(10,25,47,0.25);
  --ease-editorial: cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.6, 0.2, 1);
}
```

### 2.3 Type scale
- `display-2xl`  clamp(72px, 12vw, 168px) — hero
- `display-xl`   clamp(56px, 8vw, 112px) — section openers
- `display-lg`   clamp(40px, 5vw, 72px) — page titles
- `h1` 32 / `h2` 24 / `h3` 20 — UI
- `body` 16/1.6, `small` 13/1.5, `mono-xs` 10/1.2 letter-spaced

### 2.4 Migration rules
- Public surface: **Tailwind utilities only** (no `sx`, no inline `style={{...}}` for color/typography).
- Complex widgets (date pickers, autocomplete, virtualized lists): **MUI 9** wrapped in `components/ui/primitives/`.
- Drop Emotion runtime in client islands; use Tailwind.

---

## 3. Navbar Redesign

### Current pain
- 44 px hit area, generic Inter text, plain hover bg, no scroll-driven state, no progress, no marquee.

### Target — *"Procurement Bar"*
1. **Three states**: `transparent` (top), `solid` (scrolled > 8 px), `condensed` (scrolled > 240 px — links collapse to icon).
2. **Layout**: 12-col grid, `Brand · Nav · Utility`.
3. **Top utility strip** (h-7): language switcher (FR/AR/EN), certifications marquee (ISO 9001 · JO N°16 · Made in Morocco), cart counter, account.
4. **Main bar (h-16)**: Brand lockup left, primary nav center (4 items max), cart + account + CTA "Devis ↗" right.
5. **Effects**:
   - `backdrop-filter: blur(10px)` + 90% bone bg on solid.
   - `border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-line)` on solid.
   - Active link: gold underline (2 px) with slide-in from left, transition 200 ms.
   - Hover: 1px gold underline grow from center.
   - **Scroll progress bar** (h-1, gold) fixed under navbar.
   - **Marquee** for ISO strip — 24 s linear infinite, pause on hover.
6. **Mobile** (`md:hidden`): hamburger → full-height sheet with editorial typography (huge wordmark, mono nav, magnetic CTAs).
7. **Accessibility**: skip-to-content, focus ring 2px gold, ARIA on hamburger, ESC closes drawer, body-scroll lock when drawer open.
8. **Performance**: `NavbarClient` stays client, but splits into `NavbarShell` (server) + `NavbarInteractions` (client) to reduce bundle.

### File map
- `components/layouts/Navbar.tsx` — server, fetches session.
- `components/layouts/NavbarClient.tsx` — keeps behavior, replaced UI.
- `components/layouts/NavbarDesktop.tsx` — new.
- `components/layouts/NavbarMobile.tsx` — new.
- `components/layouts/TopStrip.tsx` — new (marquee + lang + certs).
- `components/layouts/ScrollProgress.tsx` — new.

---

## 4. Footer Redesign

### Current good
- Oversized wordmark bleed, gold CTA, 5-col link grid, certifications, socials.

### Target — *"Colophon"*
1. **Editorial colophon layout** — 4-col on desktop, 2-col tablet, 1-col mobile.
2. **Sections**:
   - `Manifesto` — 60-90 char editorial copy in italic Fraunces.
   - `Sitemap` — products, ranges, resources, legal.
   - `Engage` — newsletter (single field, gold submit), socials as 36 px squares with mono labels (IG · YT · IN · FB).
   - `Contact` — address (Casablanca), phone, email, hours.
3. **Certifications bar** — replace hard-coded spans with `<Certifications/>` component that auto-pulls from constants.
4. **Wordmark** — keep oversized bleed, add hover parallax (translate 0 → -8 px on Y with mouse Y).
5. **Bottom bar** — copyright, build SHA, locale switcher, `Made in Casablanca` mono tag.
6. **Reduce noise** — drop the radial gold gradient at top-right (already too sweet), keep one at bottom-left.

### File map
- `components/layouts/Footer.tsx` — rewrite with the above.
- `components/layouts/Footer/Manifesto.tsx`
- `components/layouts/Footer/Newsletter.tsx`
- `components/layouts/Footer/Certifications.tsx`
- `components/layouts/Footer/WordmarkBleed.tsx`

---

## 5. Page Title System

### Current pain
Every page duplicates `generateMetadata` boilerplate, hard-codes "MM Pharma" suffix, sometimes skips locale alternates.

### Target
```
lib/seo/
  title.ts         ← buildTitle(section, locale) -> "Section — MM Pharma"
  alternates.ts    ← canonical + hreflang from env
  defaults.ts      ← OG image, robots, theme color
```

### Convention
- `home` → `MM Pharma — L'hygiène pharmaceutique, formulée au ALGERIA.`
- `products` → `Catalogue · MM Pharma`
- `products/[slug]` → `{product.name} · MM Pharma`
- `about` → `À propos · MM Pharma`
- `contact` → `Contact · MM Pharma`
- `account` → `Espace client · MM Pharma`
- `admin` → `Tableau de bord · MM Pharma`

### Pattern
Every page exports:
```ts
export async function generateMetadata({ params }: Props): Promise<Metadata> {
  const { locale } = await params;
  return buildPageMetadata(locale, {
    section: 'products',
    title: t('title'),
    description: t('subtitle'),
    path: '/products',
  });
}
```

### Visual title in the page
A new `<PageHeader>` component (in `components/ui/patterns/PageHeader.tsx`) renders:
- Eyebrow (`mono N°01 — Catalogue`).
- Display heading (Fraunces, optical 144).
- Subhead in Inter Tight 17/1.6.
- Meta strip (`mono` codes, last updated, locale).

This is used on every section page to give them the same editorial identity.

---

## 6. Products Page — Fixes + Modernization

### 6.1 Build/runtime fixes
1. **`app/[locale]/(public)/products/page.tsx`**
   - Change `export const revalidate = 60` → `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'`.
   - Wrap `searchProducts` in try/catch; on error return `{ data: [], total: 0, page: 1, limit: 20, totalPages: 0 }`.
   - Remove the `await import(...)` trick; just static-import the service.
2. **`app/[locale]/(public)/products/[slug]/page.tsx`**
   - `generateStaticParams`: keep try/catch but return `[]` when `MONGODB_URI` is unset (build env).
   - Wrap `getDetail` in try/catch, surface to `notFound()` on 404.
3. **`lib/server/api/products.service.ts`**
   - Add a `safeSearch()` wrapper that:
     - Caches per filter key in-memory for 30 s.
     - Returns empty paginated + empty facets on DB error.
     - Logs with structured JSON.
4. **Public env**
   - Add `.env.example` documenting `MONGODB_URI`, `MMP_APP_URL`, `CLOUDINARY_*`.
5. **`package.json`**
   - Add `lint:fix`, `typecheck` scripts; init `.eslintrc.json` extending `next/core-web-vitals` + `next/typescript`.

### 6.2 UI modernization
- New `CatalogHeader` (replace): oversized "CATALOGUE" in Fraunces italic, gold rule, live range count, sticky filter rail.
- New `CatalogFilters` (replace): three-row band:
  - Row 1: range chips (pill, gold when active).
  - Row 2: scent, conditionnement, haute-gamme toggle.
  - Row 3: sort + view toggle (grid | editorial list).
- New `CatalogResults` (replace): 12-col editorial grid — products alternate between 1/2-wide and 1/4-wide based on `isHauteGamme`. Hover: image reveal + "Voir fiche ↗" gold underline.
- New `ProductCard` — 3 variants: `default`, `editorial` (no card, just image + type), `compact` (catalog sidebar).
- New `CatalogPagination` — page numbers in Fraunces 32, gold active, mono labels.
- Add a **live filter URL state** using `nuqs` (or `useSearchParams` + `router.push`) — already partially done, harden.
- Add **keyboard navigation** for chips (arrow keys, roving tabindex).
- Add **skeleton state** in editorial style (gold rule + line).
- Add **empty state** with an SVG illustration of a vial (custom inline SVG, not stock).

### 6.3 Product detail
- Replace breadcrumbs with editorial path strip: `01 · Catalogue / 02 · {range} / 03 · {name}`.
- Replace gallery with sticky side rail (thumbnails) + main viewer.
- Add **schema.org/Product** JSON-LD (already present, harden).
- Add **request-quote** modal (server action).
- Add **related** row in editorial style (full-bleed image cards).

---

## 7. Admin Dashboard — Build from scratch

### 7.1 Why it doesn't exist
- No `(admin)` route group, no admin role middleware, no admin API.

### 7.2 Architecture
```
app/[locale]/(admin)/
  layout.tsx                    ← role guard + sidebar shell
  admin/
    page.tsx                    ← overview (KPIs, charts)
    products/
      page.tsx                  ← list (table)
      new/page.tsx
      [id]/page.tsx             ← edit
    articles/
      page.tsx
      new/page.tsx
      [id]/page.tsx
    events/
      page.tsx
      new/page.tsx
      [id]/page.tsx
    users/
      page.tsx
    orders/
      page.tsx
    media/
      page.tsx                  ← Cloudinary browser
    seo/
      page.tsx                  ← hidden SEO pages list
    settings/
      page.tsx
```

### 7.3 Shell design
- **Sidebar** (240 px, navy, gold active marker).
- **Topbar** (h-16, paper, breadcrumb + search + user menu).
- **Content area** (12-col, max-w-7xl, p-8).
- **Aesthetic**: keep editorial — mono labels, gold numerals, oversized section headers.

### 7.4 Components
- `components/admin/Shell.tsx`
- `components/admin/Sidebar.tsx`
- `components/admin/Topbar.tsx`
- `components/admin/StatCard.tsx`
- `components/admin/DataTable.tsx` — sortable, paginated, sticky header, gold hover row.
- `components/admin/EmptyState.tsx`
- `components/admin/Editor.tsx` — TipTap with Cloudinary image upload.
- `components/admin/ImageUploader.tsx` — drag-drop, Cloudinary signed upload.
- `components/admin/Form.tsx` — Zod + RHF wrapper.

### 7.5 Auth
- `middleware.ts` already runs. Add a route-group guard in `(admin)/layout.tsx`:
  ```ts
  const session = await getOptionalSession();
  if (!session || session.role < UserRole.ADMIN) redirect(`/${locale}/auth/signin?next=/${locale}/admin`);
  ```
- Add `UserRole.ADMIN = 30` (already in constants — verify).

### 7.6 KPIs (overview)
- Active products (delta vs last 30 d)
- Pending orders (delta)
- New users (delta)
- Hidden SEO pages generated
- Recent activity feed (audit log)

### 7.7 Data table primitives
Reusable, generic over `T`:
```ts
<DataTable<AdminProduct>
  columns={columns}
  data={products}
  search
  pagination
  actions={[{ label: 'Edit', href: (r) => `./${r.id}` }]}
/>
```

### 7.8 Forms
- Zod schema in `lib/shared/schemas/*` already exists — wire to RHF.
- Inline validation, gold focus ring.
- Sticky save bar at bottom of edit screens.

---

## 8. Section Component Modernizations

### 8.1 Home
- **Hero** — keep gold italic, add scroll-cue arrow, add magnetic CTA, add film grain layer, add staggered reveal (delay 100/200/300 ms).
- **Stats** — refactor to 4-up (1 ISO cert + 5 produits + 1 marque + 1 made-in-ALGERIA) with mono label / display number / gold rule.
- **Ranges** — 5-col grid, each range a clickable card with abstract molecule SVG, count badge.
- **FeaturedProducts** — editorial carousel (4-up, snap), auto-rotate 6 s, pause on hover.
- **Quality** — split layout, left giant quote, right ISO badges.
- **AboutPreview** — strip with portrait + 2-col copy.
- **Testimonials** — magazine-style pull-quote, mono caption, gold rule.
- **Insights** — 3-up article cards, mono category, large Fraunces title.
- **EventsTeaser** — single full-bleed card with date block (giant number).
- **CommunityTeaser** — circular avatars + CTA.
- **FAQ** — editorial accordion (mono question, sans answer).
- **ContactCTA** — giant type "Parlons formulation." + gold CTA.

### 8.2 Blog
- PageHeader + grid of article cards (3-col desktop, 1-col mobile).
- Category filter as mono chips.
- Reading time computed in service layer.

### 8.3 Article detail
- Editorial article layout: eyebrow, title, byline, hero image, drop cap, related.

### 8.4 Events
- Two-up cards with date block + mono location.
- RSVP button (server action).

### 8.5 Community
- Member grid with avatar + role + contributions.
- Join CTA.

### 8.6 Contact
- 2-col: form + contact info.
- Inline SVG map of Casablanca.

### 8.7 FAQ
- Mono list with editorial answers.

### 8.8 Cart / Checkout
- Sticky order summary on the right.
- Step indicator in mono.

### 8.9 Account
- Sidebar nav (orders, articles, comments, settings).
- Profile card with avatar upload.

### 8.10 Auth
- Split layout: left editorial wordmark, right form.
- Mono labels, gold focus.

---

## 9. Cross-cutting improvements

### 9.1 Motion (`theme/motion.ts`)
```ts
export const motion = {
  duration: { fast: 150, base: 240, slow: 480, reveal: 800 },
  ease: {
    editorial: [0.2, 0.6, 0.2, 1],
    in: [0.4, 0, 1, 1],
    out: [0, 0, 0.2, 1],
  },
  stagger: (i: number) => i * 80,
};
```

### 9.2 Reveal pattern
A single `<Reveal>` client component using `IntersectionObserver` + `prefers-reduced-motion`. Apply to all section openers.

### 9.3 Performance
- Replace MUI Container/Grid in public pages with Tailwind grid.
- Lazy-load below-fold images (`next/image` + `loading="lazy"`, priority only above-fold).
- Preload display font (Fraunces) with `font-display: swap`.
- Inline critical CSS via `next/font`.
- Reduce client islands — keep interactive bits in `components/layouts/*Client.tsx`.

### 9.4 SEO
- Centralize `metadataBase`, `openGraph`, `twitter`, `icons`.
- Add `app/sitemap.ts` and `app/robots.ts` (already have `next-sitemap.config.js` — verify it's wired).
- JSON-LD: `Organization` on home, `Product` on detail, `BreadcrumbList` everywhere, `FAQPage` on /faq, `Event` on /events/[slug].

### 9.5 i18n (next-intl)
- Audit `messages/{fr-MA,ar-MA,en-US}.json` for missing keys in new components.
- Add `meta.*` namespace for page titles.
- Add `nav.cta` for "Demander un devis".
- RTL audit for `ar-MA` — ensure `dir="rtl"` on `<html>`, mirror grids/floats.

### 9.6 Accessibility
- All interactive elements ≥ 44 px hit area.
- Visible focus ring (2 px gold).
- Color contrast AA on every text/bg pair.
- `prefers-reduced-motion` honored.
- `aria-live` on cart updates.
- Skip link already present — verify and extend.

### 9.7 Tooling
- Add `.eslintrc.json` (`next/core-web-vitals` + `next/typescript`).
- Add `scripts/check-tokens.ts` — fails if any hard-coded color found in `components/**`.
- Add Vitest + Testing Library (already in `tests/`) — write smoke tests for navbar, footer, product card.
- Add Playwright for `/products` happy path.
- Add Lighthouse CI to `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.

---

## 10. Implementation Roadmap

### Phase 0 — Fix build (½ day)
1. Wrap `search()` and `getDetail()` in safe wrappers.
2. Flip `/products` to `force-dynamic`.
3. Init ESLint config.
4. Add `.env.example`.
5. Verify `npm run build` + `npm run lint` + `tsc --noEmit` pass.

### Phase 1 — Design system (1 day)
1. Add `theme/tokens.css`, `theme/motion.ts`, `theme/typography.ts`.
2. Build primitives: `Container`, `SectionLabel`, `Button`, `Chip`, `Heading`, `Rule`, `Marquee`, `GrainLayer`, `ScrollProgress`, `Reveal`, `Magnetic`.
3. Add fonts (Fraunces, Inter Tight) via `next/font/google`.

### Phase 2 — Layouts (1 day)
1. Rewrite `NavbarClient` with new layout, motion, a11y.
2. Rewrite `Footer` with colophon.
3. Centralize page titles via `lib/seo/title.ts`.
4. Add `<PageHeader>` pattern + apply to products, about, blog, contact, etc.

### Phase 3 — Products page (1 day)
1. Apply new header, filters, results, pagination.
2. Modernize `ProductCard` (3 variants).
3. Modernize product detail page.
4. Add empty / error / loading states.

### Phase 4 — Home + sections (1 day)
1. Refresh Hero, Stats, Ranges, Featured, Quality, About, Testimonials, Insights, Events, Community, FAQ, CTA.
2. Wire `<Reveal>` everywhere.

### Phase 5 — Admin dashboard (2 days)
1. Route group, layout, role guard.
2. Shell, sidebar, topbar, primitives.
3. Products admin (list/new/edit).
4. Articles admin.
5. Events admin.
6. Orders, users, media, SEO, settings stubs.

### Phase 6 — Polish (½ day)
1. i18n audit (FR/AR/EN).
2. A11y pass.
3. SEO (sitemap, JSON-LD, OG images).
4. Lighthouse > 90 on every page.
5. Visual QA on mobile / tablet / desktop.

### Phase 7 — Tests (½ day)
1. Smoke tests for navbar, footer, product card.
2. Playwright happy path for /products.
3. CI workflow.

**Total: ~6.5 working days for one engineer.**

---

## 11. Risk Register

| Risk | Mitigation |
| --- | --- |
| MUI 9 + Tailwind 4 bundle bloat | Audit chunk size; replace MUI in public surface; keep MUI for admin |
| Fraunces adds ~80 kB | Subset to Latin, preload only above-fold, swap fallback |
| RTL breaking new layouts | Build with logical properties (`ms-*`, `me-*`, `ps-*`, `pe-*`) |
| DB not reachable at build | All DB reads behind safe wrappers + try/catch |
| Lost session/admin access | Server-side role check, never client-only |
| Visual regression in redesign | Playwright visual diff on key pages |

---

## 12. Definition of Done

- `npm run build` green.
- `npm run lint` green.
- `tsc --noEmit` clean.
- Lighthouse mobile ≥ 90 (perf, a11y, bp, seo) on `/`, `/products`, `/products/[slug]`, `/contact`, `/admin`.
- All public pages use new design tokens (no inline `style` color).
- Page titles centralized + unique per route.
- Admin dashboard accessible only to admins; CRUD for products works end-to-end.
- Footer + Navbar match the *Laboratoire éditorial* direction.
- Visual QA signed off on 3 breakpoints × 3 locales.

goal.answer: Modernize the MM Pharma Next.js frontend end-to-end: fix build/data-access fragility, establish a token-first design system, rebuild navbar/footer/SEO/products/account/admin surfaces, and add automated testing/CI across all three locales.

criteria.answer:
`npm run build` exits 0 with no TypeScript or bundler errors.
`tsc --noEmit` exits 0.
`npm run lint` exits 0 after initializing ESLint config.
`scripts/check-tokens.ts` passes, confirming no hardcoded colors/spacing inline styles in `components/layouts/*`, `components/sections/products/*`, `components/ui/primitives/*`, or `app/[locale]/(public)/*`.
Navbar matches spec nav order, active state, desktop/mobile parity, scroll states, and 44 px touch targets across `fr-MA`, `ar-MA`, and `en-US`.
Footer renders colophon layout with manifesto, sitemap, newsletter, contact, certifications, and bottom bar across all three locales.
Major public/account/admin pages use centralized `lib/seo/*` helpers with title, canonical, `languages` alternates, and `x-default`; verified by inspecting generated `<head>` on `/`, `/products`, `/account`, `/admin`.
`/products` is `force-dynamic`, returns a graceful empty state when DB is unreachable, and modernized filters/cards/pagination/empty/error states work end-to-end (Playwright happy path passes).
Admin route group has server-side role guard redirecting non-admins; admin shell renders for admins and product CRUD works end-to-end.
Account dashboard is fully redesigned with editorial tokens and sidebar navigation across locales.
Home page sections (hero, stats, ranges, featured, quality, about, testimonials, insights, events, community, FAQ, CTA) are modernized with `<Reveal>` and design tokens.
Vitest smoke tests for navbar, footer, and product card pass.
Playwright happy path for `/products` filtering + pagination passes.
GitHub Actions CI workflow runs build, typecheck, lint, tests, and Lighthouse checks on pull requests.
Next.js workspace-root warning is mitigated and DB-dependent build fragility is reduced by safe service wrappers.

constraints.answer: Keep the App Router architecture and server/client boundaries; do not introduce pages router., Preserve existing public URL routes and data API contracts; only modernize UI and hardening., Support tri-locale `fr-MA`, `ar-MA`, `en-US` and RTL behavior for `ar-MA`., Public surfaces must be Tailwind-only (no `sx`/inline style for color/spacing) per the strict token rule., Admin dashboards may use MUI 9 for complex widgets but must still consume design tokens for layout/typography., All auth/admin guards must be server-side; never rely solely on client-side role checks.

phases.answer: Build hardening + tooling baseline, Design system primitives, Navbar + Footer modernization, SEO + PageHeader + metadata, Products page stabilization + modernization, Account + Admin dashboard, Home + sections + tests + CI + final polish

assumptions.answer: Strict Tailwind-only migration chosen for the public surface; admin can keep MUI widgets.; Full admin dashboard included with product/article/event/user/order/media/SEO/settings modules and product CRUD.; All public pages (home, blog, article, events, community, contact, FAQ, cart, checkout, account, auth, legal) will be modernized.; Four new runtime dependencies approved: `recharts`, `@tiptap/*` + `react-hook-form` + `@hookform/resolvers`, and `nuqs`.; `UserRole.ADMIN` is `99`; server guards use `session.role < UserRole.ADMIN`.; DB may be unavailable in build/dev; all DB reads must fail gracefully with empty states.; Cloudinary env variables are present in production; signed upload logic can be wired to existing `lib/server/api/media.service`.; Manual QA will validate visual/interactive behavior that automated tests cannot cover.

phases.name: Build hardening + tooling baseline
phases.goal: Stabilize the build, add linting, dependency budget, token-audit script, and safe data-access wrappers so subsequent phases have a reliable foundation.
phases.description: Initialize ESLint, add package scripts, install approved dependencies, document env vars, harden product service against missing DB, add `scripts/check-tokens.ts`, and mitigate the workspace-root warning in `next.config`.

steps.description: Initialize `.eslintrc.json` extending `next/core-web-vitals` + `next/typescript` and update `package.json` scripts (`lint`, `lint:fix`, `typecheck`).

steps.description: Add approved runtime dependencies (`recharts`, TipTap, `react-hook-form` + resolvers, `nuqs`) and dev dependencies for testing/CI.

verification.command: tsc --noEmit is clean

steps.description: Create `scripts/check-tokens.ts` that fails if hardcoded colors/spacing inline styles are found in enforced component directories.

steps.description: Mitigate Next.js workspace-root warning via `next.config.ts` setting and verify clean build logs.

verification.command: npm run build exits 0 with no workspace-root warning

phases.name: Design system primitives

goal: Modernize the MM Pharma Next.js frontend end-to-end: fix build/data-access fragility, establish a token-first design system, rebuild navbar/footer/SEO/products/account/admin surfaces, and add automated testing/CI across all three locales.
successCriteria: `npm run build` exits 0 with no TypeScript or bundler errors.
`npm run lint` exits 0 after initializing ESLint config.

`scripts/check-tokens.ts` passes, confirming no hardcoded colors/spacing inline styles in `components/layouts/*`, `components/sections/products/*`, `components/ui/primitives/*`, or `app/[locale]/(public)/*`.
Navbar matches spec nav order, active state, desktop/mobile parity, scroll states, and 44 px touch targets across `fr-MA`, `ar-MA`, and `en-US`.
Footer renders colophon layout with manifesto, sitemap, newsletter, contact, certifications, and bottom bar across all three locales.

Major public/account/admin pages use centralized `lib/seo/*` helpers with title, canonical, `languages` alternates, and `x-default`; verified by inspecting generated `<head>` on `/`, `/products`, `/account`, `/admin`.
`/products` is `force-dynamic`, returns a graceful empty state when DB is unreachable, and modernized filters/cards/pagination/empty/error states work end-to-end (Playwright happy path passes).
Admin route group has server-side role guard redirecting non-admins; admin shell renders for admins and product CRUD works end-to-end.
Account dashboard is fully redesigned with editorial tokens and sidebar navigation across locales.
Home page sections (hero, stats, ranges, featured, quality, about, testimonials, insights, events, community, FAQ, CTA) are modernized with `<Reveal>` and design tokens.
Vitest smoke tests for navbar, footer, and product card pass.
Playwright happy path for `/products` filtering + pagination passes.
GitHub Actions CI workflow runs build, typecheck, lint, tests, and Lighthouse checks on pull requests.
Next.js workspace-root warning is mitigated and DB-dependent build fragility is reduced by safe service wrappers.
constraints: Keep the App Router architecture and server/client boundaries; do not introduce pages router.
Preserve existing public URL routes and data API contracts; only modernize UI and hardening.
Support tri-locale `fr-MA`, `ar-MA`, `en-US` and RTL behavior for `ar-MA`.
Public surfaces must be Tailwind-only (no `sx`/inline style for color/spacing) per the strict token rule.
Admin dashboards may use MUI 9 for complex widgets but must still consume design tokens for layout/typography.
All auth/admin guards must be server-side; never rely solely on client-side role checks.
